meta.siteDescription: Professional mechanical contracting services in Fethiye region. Fire systems, heat pumps, underfloor heating, ventilation, and pool installations.

hero.title: Professional Mechanical Contracting Solutions
hero.subtitle: Fire safety, heating, cooling, and ventilation systems installation and maintenance in Fethiye and surrounding areas.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Mechanical contracting services delivered by our expert engineering team.

yangin-sistemleri.title: Fire Systems
yangin-sistemleri.description: Fire detection, suppression, and sprinkler system installation and maintenance.
yangin-sistemleri.longDescription: Design, installation, and periodic maintenance of fire safety systems for commercial and industrial buildings.

isi-pompasi.title: Heat Pumps
isi-pompasi.description: Energy-efficient heat pump system installation and service.
isi-pompasi.longDescription: Design, installation, and maintenance of air-source and ground-source heat pump systems.

yerden-isitma.title: Underfloor Heating
yerden-isitma.description: Comfortable and efficient underfloor heating system applications.
yerden-isitma.longDescription: Design and implementation of hydronic underfloor heating systems.

havalandirma.title: Ventilation
havalandirma.description: Mechanical ventilation and HVAC system design and installation.
havalandirma.longDescription: Ventilation system design and implementation for industrial and commercial spaces.

havuz-tesisati.title: Pool Installations
havuz-tesisati.description: Swimming pool mechanical systems, filtration, and heating.
havuz-tesisati.longDescription: Mechanical project design, filtration, and heating systems for swimming pools.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Likya Mekanik is an engineering-based mechanical contracting company.
about.p1: We provide professional engineering services in fire systems, heating-cooling, ventilation, and pool installations in the Fethiye region.
about.p2: We deliver our projects in accordance with industry standards, using quality materials and workmanship.
